infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Dorigo needs your location to show nearby drivers and dispatch ambulances.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Dorigo needs your location to track your ride in the background.
infoPlist.NSPhoneUsageDescription: Dorigo needs phone access to call emergency services.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Dorigo to use your location for ride tracking and emergencies.
